message:
fix: improve error messages for gt orphans and gt peek from non-rig directories (gt-7ios)

- Add --rig flag to gt orphans (persistent, works for all subcommands)
  so users can target a specific rig when not inside a rig directory
- Improve error messages in both commands when run from mayor/ or other
  non-rig directories, suggesting --rig flag or full address format
- gt peek now shows "use full address format: gt peek <rig>/<polecat>"
  when rig inference fails from a non-rig directory

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
